'''hajate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:observantly|observantly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-j-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:observantly|observantly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hajate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:hajate|hajate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hajatesher|hajatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hajatesherĂ«m|hajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hajatero|hajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hajateshĂ«|hajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hajateshĂ«m|hajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihajatero|gokihajatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihajateshĂ«|gokihajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihajateshĂ«m|gokihajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohajankerom|gohajankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohajankeshĂ«|gohajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohajankeshĂ«m|gohajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohajankeya|gohajankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hajaterom|hajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hajatemu|hajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hajateya|hajateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihajaterom|gokihajaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihajatemu|gokihajatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihajateya|gokihajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:hajajate|hajajate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hajajatesher|hajajatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hajajatesherĂ«m|hajajatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hajajatero|hajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hajajateshĂ«|hajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hajajateshĂ«m|hajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihajajatero|gokihajajatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihajajateshĂ«|gokihajajateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihajajateshĂ«m|gokihajajateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohajajankerom|gohajajankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohajajankeshĂ«|gohajajankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohajajankeshĂ«m|gohajajankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohajajankeya|gohajajankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hajajaterom|hajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hajajatemu|hajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hajajateya|hajajateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihajajaterom|gokihajajaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihajajatemu|gokihajajatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihajajateya|gokihajajateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:hĂŠjĂŠte|hĂŠjĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hĂŠjĂŠtesher|hĂŠjĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m|hĂŠjĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠjĂŠtero|hĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|hĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|hĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠjĂŠtero|gokihĂŠjĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«|gokihĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m|gokihĂŠjĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohĂŠjĂŠnkerom|gohĂŠjĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«|gohĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gohĂŠjĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohĂŠjĂŠnkeya|gohĂŠjĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hĂŠjĂŠterom|hĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hĂŠjĂŠtemu|hĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hĂŠjĂŠteya|hĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihĂŠjĂŠterom|gokihĂŠjĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihĂŠjĂŠtemu|gokihĂŠjĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihĂŠjĂŠteya|gokihĂŠjĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:hafjafte|hafjafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:hafjaftesher|hafjaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafjaftesherĂ«m|hafjaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafjaftero|hafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:hafjafteshĂ«|hafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafjafteshĂ«m|hafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafjaftero|gokihafjaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokihafjafteshĂ«|gokihafjafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafjafteshĂ«m|gokihafjafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gohafjafnkerom|gohafjafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohafjafnkeshĂ«|gohafjafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohafjafnkeshĂ«m|gohafjafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gohafjafnkeya|gohafjafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:hafjafterom|hafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:hafjaftemu|hafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:hafjafteya|hafjafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokihafjafterom|gokihafjafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokihafjaftemu|gokihafjaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokihafjafteya|gokihafjafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
